title: The Love of Jeanne Ney
writer: Ilja Ehrenburg, Rudolf Leonhardt, Ladislaus Vajda
actors: Édith Jéhanne, Uno Henning, Fritz Rasp
plot: In the Crimea, the Reds and the Whites aren't done fighting, and Jeanne discovers that the man she loves is a Bolshevik (when he kills her father). Penniless, she returns to Paris where she works for her uncle. Soon after, her lov...
